questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '0dfe52eb-da5c-471f-89cc-c6701e43e459' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '63d811f0-ad7a-45a4-b742-5c0095df054a'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '0dfe52eb-da5c-471f-89cc-c6701e43e459'; delete from question_items where id = '0dfe52eb-da5c-471f-89cc-c6701e43e459';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
